name: delete_workstream
description: Hard-delete a child workstream — removes the row AND cascades its conversation history, config, and attachments. Use for throwaway exploratory workstreams you no longer need. Irreversible. Prefer close_workstream when you might want to revisit later.

ws_id.description: Workstream id to hard-delete — exactly 32 hex chars, copied verbatim. Unknown or malformed ids error with did-you-mean suggestions; nothing is ever guessed (this verb is irreversible).
